creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mmmm, the question was "what will fail if I remove net/if_media.h" there was an answer :-)

More generally, and as documented here https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/ports.html#ports-exp-run this exp-run is at step 7, waiting for the fallout to be fixed, and restart until there is no fallout. I am going to split step 7 in more steps to make it more clear.
